channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Slashed cloud carbon 37% without losing speed
item.description: Cut cloud carbon 37% without sacrificing speed — real-time analytics pipeline went from 37 to 23 metric tons CO₂/month while lowering latency and bill 32%. How we did it: incremental aggregation, Graviton3, and Redis Streams.

item.title: Negotiate remote pay: country cost index 2026
item.description: Negotiate remote pay with a 2026 country cost index — concrete rates, formula, and negotiation scripts to stop guessing and start charging what clients expect to pay.

item.title: Laptops can run LLMs: stop outsourcing the model
item.description: Run 7B LLMs locally on a laptop — cost $0, latency 450 ms, accuracy 87%. Benchmarks, cost breakdowns, and the exact tools to avoid cloud waste.

item.title: AI sees your repo: the context gap most teams miss
item.description: Build repository intelligence graphs to cut AI PR review errors 83% — import-analyzer, networkx, and embeddings that actually understand your codebase contracts

item.title: Self-taught to senior: the real path no one admits
item.description: ps from 0.2% to 18% in 90 seconds. It does with Self-taught senior path one — a CS degree goes like this: build projects, contri.

item.title: Track 7 signals in LLM pipelines
item.description: Instrument LLM pipelines with 30 metrics and traces to cut latency 46% and errors 95% — FastAPI, LangChain, OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Grafana in 2026.

item.title: Fix RAG pipelines’ hidden latency costs
item.description: Cut RAG latency 80%: BM25 filter, hybrid rerank, Redis cache, and LLM early exit saved $90/month and avoided a $5k GPU purchase — the real levers most tutorials skip.

item.title: Senior devs flee big tech: hidden costs
item.description: Senior devs quit tech: In 2026, 68% of mid-size teams that failed. Practical guide with real examples.

item.title: 5G backend design rules: cellular latency traps
item.description: Cut 5G backend latency 26% and errors 85% with connection pooling, TLS timeouts, and p99 instrumentation. Learn carrier-grade tuning rules that break common assumptions.

item.title: AI apps: 3 patterns that don't break
item.description: Cut embedding costs 60% with a write-through cache and async pipelines — Redis 7.2, Qdrant 1.9, FastAPI 0.115, and the cache stampede fix most teams miss.

item.title: 5 AI stacks shipping real products in 2026
item.description: Ship a production product in one weekend using 5 AI-friendly stacks that cost $0–$50/month at 1 k users/day — comparison table, code snippets, and real failure modes

item.title: Embeddings vs. Vector DBs: The Real Math
item.description: loyments, 58 % of teams using vector search with Vector Databases — hit a wall when similarity search latency climbs ab.

item.title: Skip the LeetCode grind for remote roles
item.description: Pass remote tech interviews as a self-taught dev in 2026 with real debugging practice, not LeetCode. Concrete tools, latency drops, and cost-saving hacks included.

item.title: Skip the hype: simple code wins
item.description: Cut AWS bills $5,400/year and API latency 60% by stripping GraphQL, Redis, and microservices — the real cost of over-engineering in 2026 stacks

item.title: Earn $10k/month without leaving Africa
item.description: Went from $2k to $12k/month in two years with containerized benchmarks and a public /health endpoint — the exact files, commands, and numbers that recruiters audited.

item.title: Data skills that move the AI salary needle in 2026
item.description: Python vs SQL AI skills: $158k hybrid roles vs $142k Python vs $129k SQL in 2026 — benchmarked latency, cost, and the one metric that actually drives promotions.

item.title: Queues that don’t melt: pick the right one
item.description: . because 2% of messages drifted into the with Queues don melt pick — a queue and everything scales effortlessly.

item.title: Build portfolios that pass remote audits
item.description: Ship three projects and stay jobless — real portfolios that got African engineers remote jobs in 2026 used operational artifacts, not just code. Load tests, incident logs, and Grafana dashboards turned applicants into hires.

item.title: Pools exhaust your DB in 3 minutes
item.description: Cut database CPU 30% and p95 latency 77% by fixing the idleTimeout mistake most teams make in 2026. Learn the sustainable pool sizing rule used on PostgreSQL 16, AWS RDS, and Aurora Serverless v2 today.

item.title: Fine-tune or prompt? Pick wrong, waste weeks
item.description: Fine-tuning vs prompt engineering: when to choose each. Learn how to save weeks and $10k+ by picking the right approach for your AI tasks.
